title: Green background
description: Allows you to change the splash screen's background
body:
# Green Background

Allows you to customize your loading screen background and foreground (Mojang Logo) color to not just green but any color you want (as long as your monitor can display it!).

The mod also includes a neat GUI and a config file that allows you to set the background and foreground color.

Note: The background colour and foreground colour are added ***additively*** meaning their colors add up.

***VERY HIGH chance of incompatibility with mods that modify the menu such as drippy loading screen***

*The Monochromacy feature may not work as expected.*
